privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wazuh_env detect_sqli_json_app_logs task by confirming the target log path and the container name exactly match the setup scripts. The task uses synthetically generated JSON application logs seeded into the Wazuh manager container via bash echo commands. Furthermore, explicitly verified the expected custom rule ID (100100), alert level (12), and SQL injection keywords match the export_result.sh querying criteria and verifier.py scoring logic.
